name: Madara Uchiha
description:
Madara Uchiha is legendary founder of Konoha. Founder of the Sharingan, Mangekyou Sharingan and Eternal Mangekyou Sharingan, Wielder of those dreaded Wood Release, Possessor of those fabled Rinnegan being the only one capable to Genuinely awaken it besides the Sage. He can bring meteorites in the Earth's atmosphere. He survived the fight against Hashirama and still continued to reside for another 4 generations.

His Susano'o is complete (it's' legs) and can split mountains with a single wave of its own sword. Uchiha Madara blocks bijuudamas together with his gunbai. He is unstoppable.
creator: MayTsugikuni
